# <type>: <short summary>
#
# Examples:
# feat: add SQLite-backed persistence
# fix: prevent duplicate draft PR creation
# security: enforce repo authorization before planning
# docs: document release checklist

# Body:
# - Explain why the change exists.
# - Mention security impact for auth, sandboxing, secrets, logging, persistence, or runner behavior.
# - Mention tests run.

# Footer:
# Closes #123
